heading: How Your Donation Makes an Impact
description: Our platform ensures complete transparency from donation to distribution, with full integration to Qatar's Sandi system

steps.title: Choose a Verified Campaign
steps.description: Browse RACA-approved campaigns from trusted charities in Qatar

steps.title: Donate Securely
steps.description: Give easily via card, bank transfer, or digital wallet with encryption

steps.title: Track Your Impact
steps.description: Receive real-time updates on how your donation is being used

sectionDescription: Our platform uses blockchain technology to create an immutable record of every transaction, ensuring complete transparency from donor to beneficiary while integrating with Qatar's national Sandi platform.
checklist: Integrated with Sandi to prevent duplicate aid distribution
RACA approved and monitored campaigns with full oversight
Regular impact reports with photos, videos, and beneficiary stories
Blockchain-verified transaction records for complete auditability
footerNote: All donations are processed securely and are tax-deductible in Qatar
